name: NVZver
description: Vision — a personal, model-agnostic agentic engineering system. Domain-neutral core, on-demand packs.

plugins.name: lsa
plugins.description: Living Spec Architecture: spec-first methodology with nine skills (new, next, discover, plan, verify, init, reconcile, revise-constitution) and human User Verifications at every phase. Main flow: discover → plan → implement → verify.

plugins.name: helper
plugins.description: Friendly fact-grounded assistant: `/help` slash command + auto-engaging subagent on user-friction signals (consecutive discover User Verification rejections, free-form `what is X?` mid-flow), with per-signal-type cooldown to prevent nag. Depends on `core` (output discipline) and `lsa` (User Verification reject signal).

plugins.name: management
plugins.description: Product and project management discipline: shapes vague ideas into structured pitches before the build cycle. Ships a product-manager agent with dynamic domain-role adaptation and a start-feature skill that hands off to lsa:new on approval. Depends on `core` (ground-rules, output).

plugins.name: prompt-engineer
plugins.description: Prompt engineering discipline: one agent enforcing quality rules (ground rules, SOC, KISS/DRY, AI sweep, context budget) plus three commands (prompt-review, prompt-optimize, prompt-create).
